candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and matches top-line concept exactly.
Not revenue; cost line.
Also a valid top-line sales label and equals Total Revenue in the preview; useful as fallback if labeling changes by year.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability in net sales
candidates.why: Adjustment line, not total revenue.

variables.notes: Used revenue priority list per instructions: preferred exact total revenue line first, with Net sales as fallback label.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line.
Equivalent COGS/cost of sales label; good fallback if reporting label changes.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/subtotal-style row; not preferred when direct COGS exists.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortization in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Only a component of COGS, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected direct COGS labels; excluded balancing value and D&A component.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability included in selling expenses
candidates.why: Comparability/adjustment line, not core SG&A component.
Clear SG&A overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Items affecting comparability in general and administrative expenses
candidates.why: Comparability/adjustment line, not core SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview; per rule it should be included along with overhead coverage rows.

candidates.row_label: Provisions for pensions and other long-term employee benefits
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty, so included it plus populated overhead component rows for coverage across years. Excluded comparability lines and totals/subtotals.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line.
Broader finance-cost line, usable only as lower-priority fallback if no cleaner interest line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses third-party borrowings and realised losses on single currency interest rate swaps
candidates.why: Most substantive reported borrowing-interest line, though it also includes realised swap losses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on third party borrowings
candidates.why: Very clean label semantically, but preview is empty; still valid as possible year-specific label.
Broader non-interest finance expense bucket.
Specific interest subtype only, not overall interest expense.
Direct interest expense label; good priority candidate though duplicated in the statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest subtype only, not total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses third-party borrowings and realised losses on single currency interest rate swaps
Interest Expense on third party borrowings

variables.notes: Provided priority list of reported finance-cost labels. Preferred borrowing-interest lines first; included broader Other financial expenses only as last-resort fallback. Did not include lease-interest or contingent earn-out subtype lines as primary XINT labels.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests if any.
Valid total equity fallback, but less preferred than owner-attributable equity.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity first to avoid double counting MIB; Total Equity kept only as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not the balance sheet non-controlling interest equity line required for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement subtotal, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: No balance sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest line is present. Therefore MIB is treated as missing rather than manually reviewed.
